title: Uncapped Armor
description: Allows for armor values above 20 to be factored into protection
body:
This is a very simple mod that replaces values in Minecraft's default `DamageUtil` class to allow for protection values over `20` to be calculated.

The way it works is by calculating the damage based on however much armor the player has PLUS a predefined 'padding' (set in config). The higher the armor value, the higher the protection, however you wil experience diminishing returns at higher values.
